The seven-colored doll manipulator,
skilled at using dolls and magic to defeat enemies.

TH_ALICE-ALICE_CHARACTER.title: Alice Margatroid
TH_ALICE-ALICE_CHARACTER.unlockText: Play a game with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
